acceptanceCriteria: skills/orchestrate/SKILL.md describes exit-3 dry-run results the same way as skills/assess/SKILL.md and docs/orchestration.md: correctable only for an actual factual error in the assessment, never by loosening signals or raising confidence; exit-2 requires-review/unroutable results, including low confidence, remain a hard stop handed to a human.
The stopped-flow e2e test additionally asserts that a requires-review rigor route --record persisted no routing-plan artifact.
No other behavior, prose guarantee, or test is changed or weakened; the full test suite, plugin validation, and link check pass.
constraints: Change only the two findings from the GH-11 independent review; no scope expansion.
Do not delete, weaken, or skip existing tests; the new assertion may only strengthen the stopped-flow test.
Do not touch src/**, dist/**, schemas/**, or any path outside the two allowed files.
